description: Test cases for Drogon Service API migration skill

evals.name: simple-payment-migration
evals.prompt: I have this old test code that uses the plugin.createPayment() method. Can you migrate it to use the new PaymentService API with the async callback pattern?
evals.expected_output: The test should be converted to use CreatePaymentRequest structure, PaymentService->createPayment() method, and Promise/Future pattern for async handling. The test logic should remain the same, only the API calls change.

evals.name: refund-api-migration
evals.prompt: Here's a RefundQueryTest that still uses the old plugin.refund(req, callback) pattern. I need you to update it to use RefundService with CreateRefundRequest. Make sure to handle the std::error_code properly.
evals.expected_output: Should migrate to RefundService->createRefund() with CreateRefundRequest structure. Must include std::promise for both Json::Value result and std::error_code, check error before accessing result.

evals.name: callback-service-migration
evals.prompt: This WechatCallbackIntegrationTest still uses plugin.handleWechatCallback(req, callback). Can you convert it to CallbackService->handlePaymentCallback() with the proper signature parameters?
evals.expected_output: Should migrate to CallbackService->handlePaymentCallback() with direct parameters: body, signature, timestamp, nonce, serial. The HttpRequest object should be used to extract these parameters, not passed directly.
